articles.summary: Oil futures moved higher late Thursday while stock-index futures were little changed after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf, and after a federal court struck down President Donald Trump’s backup tariff plan.

articles.title: Cloudflare to cut 20% of staff in a big bet on AI. Investors aren’t sold.
articles.summary: The company’s stock falls as co-founders say the layoffs are “not a cost-cutting exercise.”

articles.title: Iren’s stock soars as a major Nvidia investment overshadows revenue shortfall
articles.summary: Nvidia is taking a major stake in Iren to build out a 5-gigawatt global footprint for its AI factory ambitions
